docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. SERVED OCT-03-2007, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT BALLARD, BEATRICE M.
